changelog: FIX: OTA updates work again. v1.44.96 through v1.44.99 silently failed to install because they changed the applicationId — your device kept showing the update prompt over and over without it actually installing. This build keeps the same applicationId as your current install, so it'll update cleanly.
FIX: Exit button correctly returns to the device home screen.
Reverted the R8 minification stack — it was causing more problems than it was worth at this stage. App is back to a 24 MB APK but the perf wins are pursued differently in a follow-up after launch.
